initiatives.title: Relax ServerSurfaceCatalogAnalyzer to recognize Tool() outside the Tools property
initiatives.notes: Strict prerequisite for Phase 2. Drop the PropertyDeclarationSyntax ancestor-walk; rely on the existing semantic ContainingType check + invocation target name for kind inference. Adds SliceFieldDetectionTests.

initiatives.title: Introduce partial keyword + extract Workspace, Symbols, Refactoring tool domains
initiatives.notes: Depends on Phase 1 merged. Main file + 3 new partial files. Tools merged via Lazy from W+S+R+Remaining; domain ordering diverges from original line order by design.

initiatives.title: Extract Analysis/AdvancedAnalysis/Validation + Editing/FileOperations/DeadCode partials
initiatives.notes: Main file + 2 new partial files. Moves the next ~55% of inline tools out of the main file.

initiatives.title: Extract Resources, Prompts, and remaining tool tail to partials
initiatives.notes: Main file + 3 new partial files. Main file becomes a pure aggregator after this ships.

initiatives.title: Optional SurfaceEntry/DTO relocation + close backlog row
initiatives.notes: Closes the backlog row. DTO relocation is conditional on post-Phase-4 conflict-frequency measurement; if main file is no longer a hotspot, skip the code movement and just close the row.
